A Head For Business.note: Prison Island quest. No giver or location data in game files.

Built To Extract.note: Prison Island quest given by Dwarfaton Ironchek in Windstone Village. Goals mention Prison Island.

Burnt Pages.note: Prison Island quest. No giver or location data in game files.

Cleansing The Ride.note: Prison Island quest given by Dwarfaton Ironchek in Windstone Village.

Death Raven.note: Prison Island quest. No giver or location data in game files.

Echoes Beyond.note: Prison Island quest given by Hilda Deeproot. Chains from Unveiling The Bound Requiem.

Echoes Of The Bound Requiem.note: Prison Island quest given by Wandering Spirit in World of the Dead.

Emerald Flame.note: Prison Island quest. No giver or location data in game files.

Essence Of The Wild.note: Prison Island quest given by Dwarfaton Ironchek in Windstone Village.

Guarding Green.note: Windreach Woods quest given by Mary Jane Greenpuff. Part of a chain (after Gathering The Fragmented, before Guarding Fortunes). High reward count (17 items). Not on corepunk.help — likely upcoming content.

Hunger Wolf.note: Prison Island quest. No giver or location data in game files.

In The Belly Of The Beasts.note: Prison Island quest given by Miguel "El Caballo" Rodriguez at Riverrise mount shop.

Lighting The Way.note: Prison Island quest given by Captain Rob.

Loose Ends.note: Steppes quest given by Tor Drostin at Central Fort. Standalone (no chain). Rewards 11 items including weapon recipes. Not on corepunk.help — likely upcoming content.

Memory Restoration.note: Goldenfield quest given by Ratchet near the Workshop. Goals: repair a Memory Core for Doc Greene. Rewards a dungeon entry item (Horsedungeon Werewolfalpha). Not on corepunk.help — likely upcoming content.

Plague Frogs.note: Prison Island quest. No giver or location data in game files.

Puzzles Of The Afterlife.note: Prison Island quest given by Captain Barnaby Plank at Riverrise City Pier. Goals mention Prison Island.

Rusty Relics For Rituals.note: Goldenfield quest given by Zugg Clankwhistle, but chains to Scarecrow Showdown (Prison Island). PI-adjacent: quest giver is in Goldenfield but chain leads to PI content.

Scarecrow Showdown.note: Prison Island quest given by Skrizzik. Chains from Rusty Relics For Rituals.

Secrets Of The Bound Requiem.note: Prison Island quest given by Kings Head.

Shattered Memory.note: Goldenfield quest given by Mortimer Gloomsworth near Cemetery. Goals: find Memory Core using ancient consoles. Rewards 10 items including T3 artifacts. Not on corepunk.help — likely upcoming content.

Stitched In Silence.note: Prison Island quest. No giver or location data in game files.

Testament Of Strength.note: Prison Island quest given by Pastor Fazool at Reverie Hollow Church.

The Final Revelation.note: Prison Island quest given by Pastor Fazool at Reverie Hollow Church.

The Key To Ratchets Repair.note: Prison Island quest given by Doc Greene.

The Light Of Dagaron.note: Prison Island quest given by Pastor Fazool at Reverie Hollow Church.

The Unlikely Courier.note: Prison Island quest given by Chance, "Avatar of Odds".

Trading Papers.note: Prison Island quest given by Skip Stones. Location has typo in game files: "Prisson Island".

Trial Of The Marked.note: Goldenfield region but PI-adjacent. Goals: "Survive on the Prison Island for 10 minutes". Chains from Trial Of Unyielding Will. Finisher is Zara Thorne.

Trial Of Unyielding Will.note: Goldenfield quest given by Wulbyan Bloodroar at Faidens Camp. PI-adjacent: chains to Trial Of The Marked (which takes place on Prison Island).

Trial Of Worthiness.note: Goldenfield quest given by Zara Thorne at Faidens Camp. PI-adjacent: chains from A Yorner Trial (PI) and to Wulbyans Challenge. Part of the Prison Island trial quest line.

Unlocking The Troll Head Ritual.note: Prison Island quest given by Skrizzik.

Unveiling The Bound Requiem.note: Prison Island quest given by Kings Head. Chains to Echoes Beyond.

War Bear.note: Prison Island quest. No giver or location data in game files.

Wulbyans Challenge.note: Goldenfield quest given by Wulbyan Bloodroar at Faidens Camp. PI-adjacent: chains from Trial Of Worthiness, part of the Prison Island trial quest line.
